title: Welcome to the Laboratory
content:
Hello, World!

First of all, pardon me for putting a lot of Steins;Gate references. I just recently dived into the Visual Novel1.

This is the first Lab Report successfully sent to the past2.

We have confirmed the operational status of the Personal Site (name subject to change). As of this divergence point, the lab is functioning correctly.

Future Lab Reports will be posted here.

I decided to put some personalities to the site, because I want to make it a fun experience. The one theme I chose is Steins;Gate. I also added some features in the terminal3. Good luck exploring them (mobile visitors are not allowed lol).

If you are curious about the references and interested in time travel sci-fi, I personally recommend you to watch the anime Steins;Gate. And if you care about ratings, it is now rated pretty high with 8.8/10.0 in IMDb4.

References

Footnotes

  1. https://store.steampowered.com/app/412830/STEINSGATE/ ↩

  2. https://steins-gate.fandom.com/wiki/Time-travel_theories ↩

  3. The one at the home page of this site. ↩

  4. https://www.imdb.com/title/tt1910272/ ↩
